task_completion.description: Log into ArkCase and open the specified complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface is visible in a browser, and a specific complaint case is open and displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Documents or Attachments section of the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Documents' or 'Attachments' tab/section within the complaint case is currently active and visible.

task_completion.description: Upload the Incident_Report.txt file to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Incident_Report.txt' is listed as an uploaded file or attachment within the case's Documents/Attachments section.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Incident Date' field to match the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Incident Date' field in the case details/metadata is filled out with a date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

task_completion.description: Add a Case Note verifying the details against the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Case Note is visible containing the text 'Verified details against report from [Officer Name]', where [Officer Name] is replaced by a specific officer's name.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface rather than using API/curl commands in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the ArkCase application with visible clicks, typing, or navigation in the UI.

integrity.description: The agent replaced the placeholder text with the actual officer name.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Case Note does NOT literally say '[Officer Name]'. It must contain an actual name from the privileged list.

integrity.description: The file was actually uploaded to the ArkCase system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Incident_Report.txt' file is shown inside the ArkCase web interface's document list, not just sitting in a local file explorer or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The uploaded file must be named 'Incident_Report.txt'. The 'Incident Date' entered in ArkCase must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. The Case Note must exactly match 'Verified details against report from [Officer Name]', where the officer name is one of the following: 'Sgt. Al Powell', 'Officer John McClane', 'Det. Martin Riggs', 'Officer Sarah Connor', 'Dep. Rick Grimes', or 'Det. Alonzo Harris'.
